name: New Orleans Shrimp & Squash Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté onions in butter until translucent.
2. Add chicken stock, yellow squash, potatoes, and carrots to the pan.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender (about 15-20 minutes).
4. Allow the soup to cool slightly before transferring it to a blender or food processor.
5. Blend the soup until smooth, returning it to the saucepan if using.
6. Add Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, dill, salt, and pepper to the soup.
7. Stir in cooked shrimp and heat through for 2 minutes.
8. Serve hot, garnished with a dollop of sour cream and fresh dill weed, if desired.
